---
title: "Credit Risk Early-Warning System (Single-Quarter Version)"
author: "Your Name"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
# Load project setup
source("R/00_packages.R")
source("R/01_config.R")

feature_panel <- readRDS(file.path(dir_features, "feature_panel.rds"))
watchlist <- readr::read_csv(file.path(dir_watchlists, "watchlist.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
metrics <- readr::read_csv(file.path(dir_metrics, "logistic_metrics.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
